# Differentiation Scale Loop

**Summary**: A method used to measure the pressure drop caused by mineral precipitation in a flow line.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-othman|Othman, 2023]] used differentiation-scale-loop to evaluate the scaling tendency of various chelating agents.

## Key Results and Findings

- DTPA at 0.1 wt.% showed the best performance in preventing scale formation compared to GLDA and EDTA. ([[2023-othman|Othman, 2023, p. 167]])
